title: Resolution Approving and Adopting Municipal Council for the Protection of Children Resolution No. 2020-02, Dated July 9, 2020, Resolution Realigning Portions of the Local Council for the Protection of Children Plan / Fund Cy 2020 Amounting to Three Hundred Eighty-five Thousand Seven Hundred Thirty Pesos (PHP 385, 730.00) for Various Purposes and Approving the Same. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 07/13/2020)
